nasb.text: In all this, they are surprised that you do not run with them into the same excesses of dissipation, and they malign you;

esv.text: With respect to this they are surprised when you do not join them in the same flood of debauchery, and they malign you;

cnv.text: 他們見你們不再與他們同奔那縱情放蕩的路，就覺得奇怪，毀謗你們。

ccb.text: 如今你们不再和他们同流合污，他们觉得奇怪，就用恶言毁谤你们。

csbs.text: 如今在这些事上，因你们不与他们一起跑进那同样放荡的洪流中，他们就感到奇怪，毁谤你们。
